name: Astral-Zacian (Crown Blade)
description: The crowned sword hero empowered by astral light. Its blade can cleave through space-time anomalies and slice solid void barriers effortlessly.
originLore: Wielding a sword forged from a dying white dwarf star, Astral-Zacian stands as the supreme protector of the Aetherium's royal sanctuaries.

lore.celestialConcordance: Astral-Zacian cuts down entropic rift monsters, sealing dimensional wounds before they destroy galactic cores.

quantumResonators.name: Behemoth Blade (Astral)
quantumResonators.description: Slashes with a colossal starlight blade that deals double damage to oversized void titans.

quantumResonators.name: Starlight Flurry
quantumResonators.description: Executes a swift sequence of sword thrusts that pierce all physical defenses.
